creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pi
Date: Sun Aug 14 18:46:49 UTC 2016
New revision: 420198
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/420198

Log:
  www/p5-Dancer2-Plugin-Interchange6: 0.202 -> 0.203

  - Enhancement:
    Main plugin needs access to the Schema's current_user so move
    stashing of user in Schema from Routes to main plugin class.
  - Bug Fix
    Add dep on Scalar::Utils for weaken method.
  - Tests
    o Remove pg_enable_utf8 from Pg tests - closes issue #1.
    o Omit BUILD from pod-coverage.

  PR:		211726
  Submitted by:	Henk van Oers <hvo.pm@xs4all.nl> (maintainer)

Changes:
  head/www/p5-Dancer2-Plugin-Interchange6/Makefile
  head/www/p5-Dancer2-Plugin-Interchange6/distinfo
